chat.title: Kuro
chat.screenPlaceholder: No screen capture yet. AI will show the screen here when using computer control.

settings.title: Chat Options
settings.noSkills: No skills found. Place SKILL.md in ~/.kuro/skills/<name>/

config.title: Settings
config.tokenBudgetDesc: Total token budget for context window
config.keepRecentDesc: How many recent turns to keep verbatim
config.extractFactsDesc: Auto-save key facts to long-term memory
config.consolidationDistanceDesc: Merge memories with cosine distance below this
config.injectTopKDesc: Inject this many lessons into context
config.errorThresholdDesc: Similar errors before creating a lesson
config.noLessons: No lessons yet. The system will learn from your action logs automatically.
config.fullAccessModeDesc: Bypass approval and sandbox checks. Use only in isolated environments.
config.fullAccessWarning: Warning: This allows high-risk commands/filesystem operations without approval prompts.
config.fullAccessConfirm: Warning: Full Access Mode disables approval/sandbox protection. Continue?
config.fullAccessEnabledToast: Full Access Mode enabled. Save to apply.
config.analysisModeDesc: When to run OCR/CV image analysis for text-only models
config.detailLevelDesc: How much detail to include in analysis
config.gridSizeDesc: Spatial grid size for coordinate mapping (2-8)
config.maxElementsDesc: Maximum UI elements to include in analysis
config.visionModelsDesc: Comma-separated list of models to force as vision-capable
config.textOnlyModelsDesc: Comma-separated list of models to force as text-only
config.tcDesc: Estimate task complexity and route to appropriate models
config.llmRefinementDesc: Use cheap model to refine ambiguous scores
config.refinementModelDesc: Cheap model for score refinement (empty = auto)
config.decompositionDesc: Split overly complex tasks into sub-tasks
config.decomposeThresholdDesc: Score above which tasks are decomposed (0-1)
config.maxSubtasksDesc: Maximum number of sub-tasks per decomposition
config.delegationComplexityDesc: Use complexity scoring for main agent delegation to sub-agents (shares the Task Complexity settings above)
config.delegationDefaultUseDesc: When enabled, delegate_to_agent uses complexity routing by default
config.delegationAutoSelectDesc: Auto-select a suitable sub-agent when target is missing or under-tier
config.delegationEnforceTierDesc: Reject/fallback when selected sub-agent tier is below required tier
config.delegationModelTrivialDesc: Preferred model when required tier is trivial
config.delegationModelSimpleDesc: Preferred model when required tier is simple
config.delegationModelModerateDesc: Preferred model when required tier is moderate
config.delegationModelComplexDesc: Preferred model when required tier is complex or expert
config.delegationThresholdComplexDesc: Score below this is complex (above = expert)
config.mlEnabledDesc: Use local DistilBERT ONNX model for complexity analysis
config.mlModeDesc: How to combine ML with heuristic scoring
config.diagDesc: LLM self-diagnostic tools for error analysis, performance profiling, and auto-repair
config.diagRepairModelDesc: Model for self-repair: "main" = same as main agent, or specify custom model
config.diagAutoDiagnoseDesc: Automatically trigger diagnostics when tool errors occur
config.diagIncludeAgentsDesc: Give sub-agents and agent instances access to diagnostic tools
config.diagMatchingModelDesc: Only include diagnostics for agents using the same model as main
config.egEnabledDesc: Prevent repeated tool loops and risky bulk operations.
config.egMaxRepeatDesc: Same tool + same args allowed this many times per task. 0 = no limit.
config.egMaxToolCallsDesc: Hard cap per task. 0 = no limit.
config.egMaxShellCallsDesc: Hard cap for shell_execute per task. 0 = no limit.
config.egMaxDownloadOpsDesc: Hard cap for download-like shell operations per task. 0 = no limit.
config.egMaxDestructiveOpsDesc: Hard cap for delete/move/rename shell operations per task. 0 = no limit.
config.egConfirmBulkDesc: Require a second confirmation when a shell command looks bulk or risky.
config.egBulkThresholdDesc: Higher value = fewer commands treated as bulk/risky.
config.egPlanCheckDesc: Ask model for a safety plan before running HIGH/CRITICAL tools.
config.egPlanModelDesc: Model used for high-risk plan checking. Empty = current model.
config.egPlanMaxTokensDesc: Token limit for high-risk plan generation.
config.restartToolEnabledDesc: Allow run_restart_script to launch a preconfigured restart script.
config.restartToolScriptPathDesc: Path to restart script (.bat/.cmd/.ps1/.sh). Empty = KURO_RESTART_SCRIPT.
config.restartToolWorkingDirDesc: Optional working directory for script launch. Empty = script folder.
config.restartToolStartScriptPathDesc: Optional start script launched after stop/restart script.
config.restartToolStartWorkingDirDesc: Optional working directory for start script. Empty = start script folder.
config.restartToolDelaySecondsDesc: Delay between stop and start scripts (0-300 seconds).
config.toolPolicyCoreDesc: Context-aware per-tool policy checks, isolation tiers, and data labels.
config.toolPolicyEnabledDesc: Run adapter/model/domain and label checks before each tool execution.
config.toolPolicyRequireApprovalDesc: Always request user approval for tools matched by this default rule.
config.toolPolicyMaxCallsSessionDesc: Hard cap for each tool in a session. 0 = no limit.
config.toolPolicyMaxCallsTaskDesc: Hard cap for each tool in one task loop. 0 = no limit.
config.toolPolicyIsolationTierDesc: standard = normal, restricted = force approval, sealed = block high-risk tools.
config.toolPolicyTaintLabelsDesc: Comma-separated labels to add after successful tool execution.
config.capabilityTokensDesc: Short-lived, scoped token checks for each tool execution.
config.capabilityEnabledDesc: Issue and validate a short-lived token before each tool execution.
config.capabilityTtlDesc: How long each capability token remains valid.
config.capabilityClockSkewDesc: Allowed clock drift while validating token timestamps.
config.capabilityBindAdapterDesc: Require token adapter to match the current runtime adapter.
config.capabilityBindModelDesc: Require token model to match the active model.
config.capabilitySingleUseDesc: Reject replay of the same token nonce.
config.capabilityPersistNonceCacheDesc: Store used nonces on disk so replay checks survive process restarts.
config.capabilityNonceCacheMaxEntriesDesc: Maximum number of nonce entries to keep in persistent cache.
config.capabilityNonceCacheFileDesc: Optional nonce cache file path. Empty = ~/.kuro/security/capability_nonces.json
config.capabilitySecretEnvDesc: Environment variable name that stores capability token signing secret.
config.secretBrokerDesc: Issue short-lived provider-key leases instead of relying on long-lived runtime secrets.
config.secretBrokerEnabledDesc: Use short-lived leases for provider credentials on each model request.
config.secretBrokerLeaseTtlDesc: Default validity period for each credential lease.
config.secretBrokerMaxTtlDesc: Upper bound for lease validity even when a longer TTL is requested.
config.secretBrokerMaxActiveLeasesDesc: Maximum in-memory active lease records before trimming.
config.secretBrokerExportEnvDesc: Compatibility mode for SDKs that still require environment variables.
config.secretBrokerRevokeOnRotateDesc: Immediately revoke old leases after rotating provider secret.
config.isolatedRunnerDesc: Stricter runtime profile for selected high-risk tools.
config.isolatedRunnerEnabledDesc: Apply isolated profile to configured tools and isolation tiers.
config.isolatedRunnerToolsDesc: Comma-separated tool names routed to isolated profile.
config.isolatedRunnerTiersDesc: Isolation tiers that force isolated profile.
config.isolatedRunnerMaxTimeDesc: Timeout cap for isolated tool execution.
config.isolatedRunnerClearEnvDesc: Use a reduced subprocess environment while isolated.
config.isolatedRunnerLockCwdDesc: Block shell working_directory override in isolated mode.
config.isolatedRunnerHardModeDesc: Enable stronger command-level restrictions for isolated shell execution.
config.isolatedRunnerHardBlockNetworkDesc: Block command patterns like curl/wget/ssh in hard mode.
config.isolatedRunnerHardBlockWriteDesc: Block file/package mutation command patterns in hard mode.
config.isolatedRunnerHardBlockSpawnDesc: Block background/spawn command patterns in hard mode.
config.isolatedRunnerHardBlockRedirectDesc: Block shell redirection operators like >, >>, 2>, << in hard mode.
config.isolatedRunnerHardRestrictDirsDesc: Block execution when cwd is outside sandbox allowed_directories.
config.isolatedRunnerHardAllowPrefixesDesc: Optional command-prefix allowlist for hard mode (empty = pattern blocks only).
config.isolatedRunnerHardRequireSandboxDesc: Fail shell execution when external sandbox prefix is not configured.
config.isolatedRunnerHardSandboxPrefixDesc: Optional command prefix for external sandbox runner (for example: firejail --quiet --net=none).
config.dataFirewallDesc: Sanitize untrusted web/MCP output before context injection.
config.dataFirewallEnabledDesc: Filter untrusted tool output before it is sent to model context.
config.dataFirewallToolPatternsDesc: Comma-separated fnmatch patterns of tools to sanitize.
config.dataFirewallNeutralizeInjectionDesc: Remove lines that look like instruction-override attacks.
config.dataFirewallRemoveCommandsDesc: Drop lines that resemble executable shell commands.
config.dataFirewallMaxBase64Desc: Base64 chunks larger than this are replaced before context injection.
config.dataFirewallMaxContextCharsDesc: Truncate sanitized output to this size before context injection.
config.dataFirewallAnnotationPrefixDesc: Prefix shown when output is sanitized.
config.egressPolicyDesc: Central outbound HTTP policy for web/crawl/plugin requests.
config.egressPolicyEnabledDesc: When enabled, outbound URLs are checked before network requests.
config.egressPolicyDefaultActionDesc: Behavior when no allowlist rule matches.
config.egressAllowHttpDesc: If off, only HTTPS URLs are allowed.
config.egressAllowedDomainsDesc: Comma-separated host/domain allowlist. Empty = all (subject to default action).
config.gatewayEnabledDesc: Route outbound HTTP traffic through one gateway proxy.
config.gatewayModeDesc: shadow logs only, enforce actually routes through proxy.
config.gatewayBypassDomainsDesc: Comma-separated domains that skip gateway routing.
config.gatewayIncludePrivateDesc: If off, localhost/private network hosts bypass gateway.
config.gatewayRolloutPercentDesc: In enforce mode, only this percentage of traffic is routed via gateway (0-100).
config.gatewayRolloutSeedDesc: Deterministic seed used for rollout bucket selection.
config.egressMaxResponseBytesDesc: Maximum HTTP response body size. 0 = no limit.
config.budgetFuseDesc: Session circuit breaker for tool and network usage.
config.budgetFuseEnabledDesc: Track per-session tool/network usage and enforce safety thresholds.
config.budgetFuseActionDesc: What happens when thresholds are exceeded.
config.budgetFuseToolCallsDesc: Hard cap for total tool executions. 0 = no limit.
config.budgetFuseNetworkCallsDesc: Hard cap for outbound/network tool calls. 0 = no limit.
config.budgetFuseNetworkBytesDesc: Hard cap for accumulated network result payload bytes. 0 = no limit.
config.mcpDesc: Connect external MCP servers and choose which tools to enable.
config.mcpEnabledDesc: When disabled, no MCP servers are connected and no MCP tools are exposed.
config.mcpServersDesc: Configure server command/env and choose enabled tools per server.
config.mcpAllToolsEnabled: All discovered tools are currently enabled.
config.comfyuiConnectionDesc: Configure the remote ComfyUI server address and timeouts.
config.comfyuiTimeoutDesc: Max seconds to wait for image generation to complete.
config.comfyuiOutputDirDesc: Local directory to save generated images. Empty = ~/.kuro/comfyui_output/
config.comfyuiDefaultsDesc: Default parameters for image generation. Can be overridden per request.
config.comfyuiCheckpointDesc: Default model checkpoint name. Use comfyui_status tool to list available models.

security.title: Security Dashboard
security.gatewayReasonMissingProxy: Gateway enabled but proxy URL missing
security.gatewayNextAlreadyEnforce: Already in enforce mode, continue monitoring
security.gatewayNextShadowBurnIn: Continue shadow burn-in for more samples
security.capabilityDenyNoData: No capability token denials in this window
security.secretBrokerDisabled: Secret Broker is disabled in current config
security.dataFirewallNoData: No sanitization events in this window

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.budgetDesc: Configure reminder / hard-stop budgets by period and model.
analytics.budgetModelsHint: Pick from dropdown and add. Choose all models to apply globally.
analytics.budgetNoModelsSelected: No models selected (all models will be matched)
analytics.budgetTargetsHint: Pick from dropdown and add. You can select multiple targets.

scheduler.noTasks: No scheduled tasks. Create one by chatting with Kuro.

agents.noInstances: No agent instances configured. Create one to get started.
agents.usageTip: To chat with an agent: go to Chat, use split layout, then select the agent from the panel dropdown.
